items.briefing:
With the FIFA World Cup 2026 underway, cybercriminals are actively targeting fans through fake ticketing sites, phishing emails, and fraudulent streaming links — staff should be cautious about clicking unsolicited offers related to the tournament. Separately, new figures show 45% of small and medium businesses experienced a cyber incident recently, a reminder that no organisation is too small to be targeted.

**Practical tip:** If you receive any FIFA-related deals or links via email or social media, go directly to official websites rather than clicking through — if it looks too good to be true, it probably is.

featured.title: ESET report finds 45% of SMBs hit by cyber incidents
featured.quote: Nearly half of Australian small businesses suffered cyber incidents, highlighting critical vulnerability.
